subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The fluent verses and eloquent poetry which thou didst previously send [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان منظومه فصیحانه و اشعار بلیغانه که از پیش روانه نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @past, present and future of Iran, @consolation and comfort
